lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real LLM-driven rework via the existing seasonal.analyze ML path; SST loader + ML handler tests drive the proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## ML Handler Evidence' + 'SST loader Evidence': the seasonal significance decision now flows through the seasonal.analyze ML path; TestSeasonalAnalyze proves the no-LLM/no-signal skip contract (no hardcoded ratio fallback) and the coherent observations response; the SST loader tests prove fail-loud operational bounds.

scenarios.title: Operational seasonal-detection bounds are fail-loud SST config
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Missing/empty INTELLIGENCE_SEASONAL_* keys fail loud naming the var; out-of-range values (min_data_days<=0, topic_min_captures<=0, topic_candidate_limit<=0, max_observations<=0) are rejected.

scenarios.title: ML seasonal handler judges significance and never falls back to a hardcoded ratio
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: handle_seasonal_analyze consumes raw signals {current_month,data_days,this_month_count,last_year_same_month_count,topic_candidates} and returns {observations:[...]}; with no LLM configured it returns zero observations (no hardcoded ratio fallback).
